name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 17 Jun 2024
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release contains updates of eCommerce versions "},{"text":"6.298.0","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"6.299.0","bold":true},{"text":", which include the upgrades to Stripe integration."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancement","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Stripe Payments Upgrades"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this update, Neto has upgraded its integration to the Stripe Payment Element, allowing seamless payments with significantly lower downtime for payment processing."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have introduced a few enhancements to the Stripe Payment method, allowing enhanced visibility over transactions via "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/stripe-credit-card-payment-method#Payment_Statuses","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"payment statuses","bold":true}]},{"text":" and an improved UI for credit card forms."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have also introduced "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/stripe-credit-card-payment-method#Stripe_BNPL_Configs","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Stripe’s BNPL options","bold":true}]},{"text":" like Afterpay, Klarna, and Affirm that allow customers to split their purchases into manageable instalments via flexible payment options."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"What’s New?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Stripe Payment Element","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Following the upgrade, you will notice these changes:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You now have visibility over "},{"text":"Incomplete","bold":true},{"text":" transactions in your Stripe dashboard. You can now identify the incomplete transactions on the Stripe dashboard. The transactions which have not reached completion are shown as incomplete. "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/netoreleaseimg1.068J1000001X8KxIAK.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/netoreleaseimg1.068J1000001X8KxIAK.png","name":"netoreleaseimg1","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":143,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The incomplete status indicates a "},{"text":"payment intent","italic":true,"bold":true},{"text":" ","italic":true},{"text":"from the customer’s end, acting as a placeholder for the beginning of a payment transaction. This status is not a reflection of a technical issue."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The UI of the Stripe Payment Element credit card form has been updated as shown below - Change in UI of credit card form on Checkout."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/netoreleaseimg2.068J1000001X8L7IAK.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/netoreleaseimg2.068J1000001X8L7IAK.png","name":"netoreleaseimg2","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":386,"width":950}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Customers on eligible devices or web browsers may also see an option to use their Google Pay or Apple Pay card wallets."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/netoreleaseimg3.068J1000001X8LCIA0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/netoreleaseimg3.068J1000001X8LCIA0.png","name":"netoreleaseimg3","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":486,"width":908}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"What action is required?","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Though the upgrade will be seamless and does not require any action from you, we do recommend:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Checking your webstore checkout page and ensuring that the new credit card form is correctly loaded upon selecting a Stripe card payment method"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Keeping an eye on your Stripe dashboard to ensure transactions are still correctly flowing through"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"If any issue is spotted, first try to reconnect your Stripe integration from the Control Panel, and if the issue persists contact Maropost Support immediately."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Introducing Stripe BNPL options","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You will now be able to "},{"text":"configure BNPL options","bold":true},{"text":" via Stripe in Neto. Use payment methods like Afterpay, Klarna, and Affirm to split payments accordingly, which enhances affordability for the customers. You will also be able to install a widget for the same for your webstore."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
